slogan: Pick your Layers, Style your Vision
tab1Content: Define visual elements such as colors, typography, and spacing.
tab2Content: Implement components and write interaction logic.
tab3Content: Build and deploy as static files.
acc1Content: Layout is the way screen elements are arranged. It uses Grid, Flexbox, and more.
acc2Content: Use semantic color tokens like Primary, Surface, and Accent to maintain consistency.
acc3Content: Define font family, size, letter spacing, and line height to match the theme.
anonymousNote: Comments are anonymous. Refresh may change your deletion rights.

themes.basic: A simple, balanced base theme suitable for scalability and readability.
themes.flat: A clean, modern UI theme based on flat design principles.
themes.dark: A dark theme that reduces eye strain, suitable for dev tools and media apps.
themes.midcentury: Midcentury modern style from the 1950s–60s with warm tones and geometric motifs.
themes.bauhaus: Function-forward design using geometry and primary colors inspired by Bauhaus.
themes.cyberpunk: A bold neon and digital-flavored theme with high contrast colors.
themes.vaporwave: Retro 80s–90s aesthetic with purple and pink palettes and dreamy tones.
themes.rococo: An ornate, elegant theme with decorative curves and floral accents.
themes.artnouveau: Decorative, flowing curves and nature motifs for an elegant aesthetic.
themes.newtro: A modern-retro hybrid combining contemporary colors with vintage elements.
